name: penumbra-glsl-90-compile-bench
description: Phase 6 section-5.3 shader-compile measurement vehicle (NOT a regression test; run standalone with --test, never in the penumbra-glsl suite). Loads the same structural sphere scene as penumbra-glsl-00, waits for steady, then runs _PenumbraGlCompileBench 20: the conduit recompiles+relinks the RETAINED production-scene fragment shader into throwaway programs, one per frame, emitting gl.compile-bench.sample/.summary NDJSON (captured into this run's per-suite telemetry via the flight-recorder run-tail). COLD number = this run's first gl.build.compile-link.pass1 event (clear the Intel driver shader cache before launching for a true cold); WARM = the bench p50/p95. Threshold for the measured shader-compile gate is picked by the operator from these numbers (recommendation: >= p95 x 1.5), per the amended V5 decision 8 (operator-run local gate, no CI wiring).
